name: token-drift
description: Design-token drift auditing between Figma Variables or DTCG exports and code-side CSS variables.

interface.shortDescription: Compare design tokens against CSS variables.
interface.longDescription: Design-token drift auditing between Figma Variables or W3C DTCG exports and code tokens. It compares values, presence gaps, type mismatches, and alias cycles.
defaultPrompt: Compare Figma tokens to CSS variables.
Explain token drift in this repo.
